storyHook: 输入关键词，筛选结果，找到答案

narrative.when: 周一下午，遇到一个不明白的问题
narrative.who: 甲（提问的人）· 乙（同事，帮忙一起查）
narrative.how: 打开搜索页面输入关键词
narrative.method: 提出疑问、输入关键词、筛选查看结果、记下答案
narrative.event: 甲不确定一个词的意思，想尽快查清楚再继续工作

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What is this word?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have no idea about it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us look it up on the net.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. I will open a page to look for it.
turns.zh: 好主意。我打开页面找找看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What is the word?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a new word to me.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a hard one. Put it in.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I am putting it down now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us see what comes up.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The first is a long page.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That one is full of hard words.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I do not get it as well.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us have a go with another word?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, put the sense after it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now the second one is clear.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the one we need.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will say it out.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go on, take your time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A: It says it is a short name for a thing.
turns.zh: 上面说它是一个东西的简称。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So it is a short word.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A: Yes, that makes sense now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good, we have the answer.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A: I will put it on a note.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then you may go back to work.
turns.zh: 然后你可以继续工作了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A: Right, thanks for the help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put in another word to make it clearer?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good thought. What about 'sense'?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, let us see what comes up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This one looks like a list of words.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is a good place for a short name.
turns.zh: 对，那是查简称的好地方。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here it is. It says 'short for a long name'.
turns.zh: 找到了。上面写“是长名称的简称”。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So it is not a hard word at all.
turns.zh: 所以这个词一点也不难。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, it is quite simple when you see it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will make a note of that.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then we are done. Back to work.
turns.zh: 那就搞定了。继续干活吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Okay, let us look at the details.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This looks like a word list.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, this matches what we need.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here it is. 'Short for a long name.'
turns.zh: 就是这个。写的是‘长名的短叫法’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So this part is very simple.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us put in a better word.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What about 'short name'?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I will do that.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: See, the first one is a page of names.
turns.zh: 看，第一条就是名称列表。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the one. Open it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It has a list of short names and their full forms.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Go down to the third point.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here. The secret group keeps watch on other lands.
turns.zh: 给。秘密组织盯着别国的情况。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So you see how it works.
turns.zh: 所以你明白它是怎么运行的了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let me make a note.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it in my note book.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now we have the answer.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. That was quick work.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We did well together.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us get back to work.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I have a clear head now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will go on with my writing.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And I will go back to my numbers.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Say if you need help again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. Thanks for your time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me put in the word.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. What did you put?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The strange word from the writing.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put your finger on the look-up button. Let us see.
turns.zh: 按一下查找键。我们看看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a long list of pages.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The third one seems good.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will open it. One minute.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Too many hard words again.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about putting a 'sense'?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. That will make it clear.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, the second one is short.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will give it a look.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the sense I was after.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now we have it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it down on a bit of paper.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do that. Then get back to work.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The writing will be clear now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. No more stopping.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks for your help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Any time. Happy to give a hand.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let us put in the word.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is the first one?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A list from a book of words.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That seems good. Let us see.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Too much hard talk. Not clear.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put 'sense' after it and have another look.
turns.zh: 后面加上“定义”再看一次。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This one is short and simple.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is the sense we need.
turns.zh: 对，这就是我们要的意思。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Say it out for me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It says: 'a thing that makes a change'.
turns.zh: 上面写着：“一个带来变化的东西”。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, got it. That is clear now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put it down so you keep it in mind.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it on a note.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Then we can go on with the work.
turns.zh: 好，那我们可以继续干活了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, that word was stopping me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now the rest of the writing is smooth.
turns.zh: 现在剩下的文字就顺了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am glad to do this.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble. Happy to give a hand.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will have a drink of water and get back to it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. I have my own work to do.
turns.zh: 好主意。我也有自己的事要忙。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, back to it then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will start from the top again.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. That word will not trouble you now.
turns.zh: 好，那个词现在不会难住你了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, it is clear as day.
turns.zh: 不会了，清楚得像白天一样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep my note here in view.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Wise. A note is a good friend.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us get a drink after work.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that would be a good end to the day.
turns.zh: 好，那会是今天一个不错的收尾。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will send you a word when I am done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I will be here.

storyBlurb: 周一下午，甲对着屏幕皱眉，一个陌生词汇卡住了工作。乙凑过来，两人一起搜索，终于找到答案。
storyScript:
【开场·提出疑问】周一下午的办公室安静如常，只有键盘敲击声。甲盯着文档里那个加粗的术语，眉头渐渐拧紧。这个词从未见过，上下文也模糊不清，像一粒沙子卡在齿轮间，让整段文字读起来磕磕绊绊。甲的手指悬在键盘上方，犹豫片刻后，转头看向邻座的乙。乙正对着报表沉思，察觉到目光便摘下耳机。甲指了指屏幕上的词，压低声音说：这个词什么意思？查一下。乙点点头，椅子滑近，两台电脑的屏幕光映在两人脸上。

【进行·输入搜索】甲打开搜索页面，光标在搜索栏里闪烁。他快速敲下那个词，回车，结果页面瞬间铺满。第一条是百科词条，第二条是论坛讨论，第三条是专业博客。乙侧过身，指着第三条说：这个看起来靠谱。甲点开链接，页面加载时两人屏息等待。内容跳出，是一篇技术解析，但术语堆叠，读了三行仍不得要领。乙摇头：太绕了，换个关键词。甲删掉原词，加上“定义”二字重搜。这次结果更直白，第二条来自一个术语库，解释简洁清晰。乙用笔尖点着屏幕：就是这个。甲滚动页面，逐句读完，脸上渐渐明朗。

【收束·找到答案】甲从笔筒抽出一支便签纸，快速记下释义和出处，贴在显示器边框上。乙退回自己的座位前，拍了拍甲的肩。甲重新聚焦文档，那个词现在像被擦亮的玻璃，整段文字通透起来。他继续敲击键盘，节奏比之前轻快许多。窗外阳光斜照进办公室，尘埃在光柱里缓缓浮动。甲端起凉掉的咖啡喝了一口，嘴角微微上扬——问题解决了，工作可以继续。
